alt: NCL Norwegian Bliss anchored off cliffs, port side showing Wyland humpback whale mural on bow and Aqua Park waterslides on upper deck
description: Norwegian Bliss anchored off Portland Port, Dorset, England on 11 October 2020. Port-side view showing the Robert Wyland humpback whale hull artwork around the bow, the NORWEGIAN BLISS name on the hull, and the blue Aqua Park waterslide structures on the upper deck.
title: Norwegian Bliss
